channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia covertly struck Iran during US-Iran war, sources say
item.description: Saudi Arabia conducted undisclosed strikes against Iran during the ongoing conflict, marking a shift from its traditional diplomatic stance as regional tensions escalate.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China presses Pakistan to deepen Iran mediation ahead of Trump-Xi talks
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi highlighted Strait of Hormuz security and regional stability as Middle East tensions loom over this week's Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.

item.title: 📊 US inflation jumps as Iran war sends energy prices higher
item.description: US consumer inflation rose after falling steadily since the 2022 peak, driven by energy price increases from the ongoing US-Iran conflict affecting fuel costs.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU expresses frustration over failed defense industry ramp-up
item.description: EU top diplomat Kaja Kallas voiced frustration over the bloc's slow defense production pace, drawing contrast with Ukraine's rapid industrial growth amid the Russia war.

item.title: 💰 Allies surpass US in military budget purchasing power as NATO spending rises
item.description: A new report shows US allies have surpassed the US in combined military purchasing power, though Washington remains the single highest military spender globally.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦 US Weapons Stockpile Depletion Raises Concerns for Ukraine Aid
item.description: Weeks of conflict with Iran have depleted critical US weapons stocks, leading European allies to question the viability of American support for Ukraine as the war stretches Pentagon supplies.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Trump Backs Pakistan as Iran War Mediator Despite GOP Criticism
item.description: President Trump endorsed Pakistan to facilitate Iran diplomacy, brushing off criticism from Senator Lindsey Graham who questioned whether Islamabad can be trusted to broker peace in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU imposes sanctions on Israeli settlers as West Bank tensions rise
item.description: The European Union imposed sanctions on Israeli settlers accused of violence against Palestinians in the West Bank, marking a significant policy shift amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran increasingly targets UAE in war messaging as Gulf tensions rise
item.description: Iran has shifted its rhetoric to target the United Arab Emirates, accusing Gulf states of supporting US military operations and warning of broader regional consequences.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia-Ukraine war latest: Ceasefire ends, strikes resume
item.description: The three-day Victory Day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine has ended, with both sides resuming military operations as international attention focuses on the US-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Prime Minister Starmer resigns amid political turmoil
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer resigned following weeks of political pressure, triggering a Labour Party leadership contest as the UK faces economic and diplomatic challenges.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuela-Guyana dispute escalates as court rules on Essequibo
item.description: Venezuela's claim to Guyana's Essequibo region moved through international courts, with implications for oil development and regional stability as the US maintains pressure on Caracas.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin hails test of new nuclear-capable ICBM, calls it world's most powerful
item.description: Russia successfully tested its Sarmat intercontinental ballistic missile, with Putin claiming the individually targeted warheads deliver four times the power of any Western counterpart.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Senate confirms Trump pick Kevin Warsh to Federal Reserve Board
item.description: The Senate confirmation clears the way for Warsh to potentially replace Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve chair later this week, marking a significant shift in US monetary policy leadership.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump rejects 'garbage' Iran peace plan before heading to China
item.description: President Trump dismissed a proposed Iran peace plan as inadequate before departing for Beijing, where he is expected to seek Chinese President Xi Jinping's assistance in resolving the conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US finalizes $35.5 billion in refunds for illegal Trump tariffs
item.description: US Customs and Border Protection processed over 126,000 refund applications for tariffs deemed illegal by courts, marking one of the largest tariff reimbursement programs in US history.

item.title: 🇰🇼 Kuwait foils IRGC infiltration operation
item.description: Kuwaiti security forces thwarted an attempted infiltration by Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, highlighting the spread of Iran-related security concerns across Gulf states.

item.title: 💰 Pentagon gives new $29 billion Iran war price tag
item.description: The Pentagon updated its cost estimate for the Iran conflict to $29 billion, up from $25 billion two weeks ago, reflecting equipment repair and replacement costs as the war continues.

item.title: 🦠 WHO urges countries to prepare for hantavirus cases
item.description: The World Health Organization warned nations to prepare for potential hantavirus outbreaks following a cluster of cases in Spain, with 11 confirmed infections so far.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky's former second-in-command Yermak charged in major corruption probe
item.description: Andriy Yermak, former chief of staff to President Zelensky and Ukraine's lead negotiator with the US, faces money laundering charges in a sweeping anti-corruption investigation.

item.title: 🚢 Russian ship with nuclear reactors for North Korea sank off Spain
item.description: A Russian cargo vessel carrying nuclear reactor components destined for North Korea sank in the Mediterranean near Spain, raising environmental and proliferation concerns.

item.title: 🇪🇸 Spain reports new hantavirus case as outbreak grows to 11
item.description: Spanish health authorities confirmed another hantavirus infection, bringing the total to 11 cases in an unusual European outbreak that has drawn WHO attention.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump's Golden Dome missile defense to cost $1.2 trillion, may fail against all-out attack
item.description: A government watchdog report estimates Trump's proposed missile defense system could cost $1.2 trillion and may still fail to stop a coordinated attack, raising questions about the program's viability.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump says FDA Commissioner Marty Makary is out
item.description: President Trump announced the departure of FDA Commissioner Marty Makary following weeks of pressure from Republican lawmakers and anti-abortion groups.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba seeks US talks after Trump threat
item.description: Cuba requested negotiations with the US after Trump threatened action against Havana, following the US seizure of Venezuelan leader earlier in 2026.
